mapper.select: SELECT id, pid, title, type, permission, component, icon, name, redirect, sort, hidden, path, affix, keep_alive, create_time FROM menu WHERE del_flag = 0 ORDER BY sort ASC, id ASC

SELECT DISTINCT m.permission FROM menu m INNER JOIN role_menu rm ON rm.menu_id = m.id INNER JOIN user_role ur ON ur.role_id = rm.role_id WHERE ur.user_id = #{userId} AND m.del_flag = 0 AND m.permission IS NOT NULL AND m.permission != ''

SELECT DISTINCT m.id, m.pid, m.title, m.type, m.permission, m.component, m.icon, m.name, m.redirect, m.sort, m.hidden, m.path, m.affix, m.keep_alive, m.create_time FROM menu m INNER JOIN role_menu rm ON rm.menu_id = m.id INNER JOIN user_role ur ON ur.role_id = rm.role_id WHERE ur.user_id = #{userId} AND m.del_flag = 0 ORDER BY m.sort ASC, m.id ASC
